title: Cancer-Fighting Foods
body:
# [Best Cancer-Fighting Foods:](https://www.pakfitzone.site/right-sidebar/)

* **Leafy Greens:** Spinach, kale, and Swiss chard are packed with vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants that help protect cells from damage.
* **Cruciferous Vegetables:** Broccoli, cauliflower, Brussels sprouts, and cabbage contain sulforaphane, which has been shown to reduce cancer cell growth.
* **Berries:** Blueberries, raspberries, and strawberries are rich in antioxidants that help fight free radicals and reduce the risk of cancer.
* **Garlic and Onions:** These contain sulfur compounds that support detoxification and may lower the risk of several types of cancer.
* **Tomatoes:** High in lycopene, which has been linked to reduced risks of prostate, lung, and stomach cancers.
* **Turmeric:** Contains curcumin, a powerful anti-inflammatory compound that may help slow cancer progression.
* **Green Tea:** Packed with catechins, which can help inhibit tumor growth and support overall cellular health.
* **Nuts and Seeds:** Almonds, walnuts, and flaxseeds provide essential fatty acids and antioxidants that support immune function.
* **Fatty Fish:** Salmon, mackerel, and sardines are rich in omega-3 fatty acids, which help reduce inflammation in the body.
* **Whole Grains:** Brown rice, quinoa, and whole wheat provide fiber, which is essential for gut health and cancer
